global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a prominent product graphic and clear promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a stylish shelf with a special offer.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'LuxShelf' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Stylized shelf graphic
elements.description: A stylized graphic of a shelf with two doors, depicted in a simple, minimalist design.

elements.label: Shelf knobs
elements.description: Two circular knobs are illustrated below the shelf graphic, adding detail to the product representation.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: The price is displayed as '€29.99' in a prominent, easy-to-read font at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Install now' is positioned prominently, encouraging user action.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: The main promotional message reads 'Your next favorite pick Free shipping over $25', presented in a clear, inviting font.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Free shipping over $25 €29.99 Install now

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small badge with the text 'SALE' in bold letters, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label reading 'UGC' is placed at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern minimalist with bold colors, LuxShelf logo, promotional message, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the product graphic is centered, the promotional message is below the graphic, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: LuxShelf, SALE, UGC, Your next favorite pick, Free shipping over $25, €29.99, Install now
